title: task
description: rust/lichen-embassy/src/mock.rs:67 - MockRadio.rx_queue uses Vec::pop() which pops from the end (LIFO). If you feed_rx(A) then feed_rx(B), receive() returns B first, not A. This violates FIFO ordering expected for a receive queue. Should use VecDeque::pop_front() or Vec::remove(0) for correct ordering.
